top3.sql:
SELECT c.cardKingdomFoilId, c.id
FROM cards c
WHERE c.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL
  AND c.cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.cardKingdomFoilId, c.id
LIMIT 3;

SELECT c.cardKingdomFoilId
FROM cards c
WHERE c.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.cardKingdomFoilId
ORDER BY c.cardKingdomFoilId ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT c.cardKingdomFoilId, c.id
FROM cards c
WHERE c.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL
  AND c.cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.cardKingdomFoilId, c.id
LIMIT 3;

SELECT c.cardKingdomFoilId
FROM cards c
WHERE c.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.cardKingdomFoilId
ORDER BY c.cardKingdomFoilId ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT c.cardKingdomId, c.cardKingdomFoilId
FROM cards c
WHERE c.cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL AND c.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.cardKingdomId, c.cardKingdomFoilId
ORDER BY c.cardKingdomFoilId ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT c.cardKingdomFoilId, c.id
FROM cards c
WHERE c.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL
  AND c.cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.cardKingdomFoilId, c.id
LIMIT 3;

SELECT id
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1
ORDER BY id ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT c.cardKingdomFoilId
FROM cards c
WHERE c.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.cardKingdomFoilId
ORDER BY c.cardKingdomFoilId ASC
LIMIT 3;

final.sql:
SELECT c.cardKingdomFoilId, c.id
FROM cards c
WHERE c.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL
  AND c.cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.cardKingdomFoilId, c.id
LIMIT 3;
